evt_015.label: Drop
evt_015.basis: Party D withdrew by saying it would not proceed with further due diligence after the Company refused its requested exclusivity commitment.
evt_015.source_text: Party D indicated that it would not proceed with further due diligence at that time.

cycle_1.basis: No formal proposals in this cycle.

initiation_judgment.basis: The process was triggered by Party A's expression of interest, after which the Board retained GHF and broadened the outreach to other buyers.
initiation_judgment.source_text: During the meeting, Party A suggested possible joint venture arrangements and expressed some interest in acquiring equity in the Company to further develop strategic opportunities and enhance regional connectivity.

advisor_bmo_capital_markets.source_text: the subcommittee recommended to the Board that the Company retain GHF as its investment banking firm

advisor_hinckley_allen.source_text: the Company’s legal counsel, Hinckley, Allen & Snyder LLP

advisor_simpson_thacher.source_text: Simpson Thacher & Bartlett LLP (which we refer to as " Simpson Thacher"), G& W’s legal counsel

count_reconciliation.assertion: 11 potential strategic buyers, including Party A, executed confidentiality agreements.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly after representing the remaining 10 strategic NDA signers as a grouped bidder actor.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 14 potential financial buyers executed confidentiality agreements.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly after representing the unnamed financial NDA signers as a grouped bidder actor.
